name: NGP VAN Political CRM API
what_it_does: NGP VAN REST API for political CRM and voter management platform. Enables AI agents to manage voter and supporter contact records, track canvassing and phone banking activities, manage event RSVPs and volunteer coordination, access fundraising data, retrieve voter file data, manage activist codes and lists, integrate with voter registration databases, and sync campaign data with digital organizing tools.
use_cases: Managing voter and supporter contact records from political organizing agents
Tracking canvassing survey results and contact attempts from field organizing agents
Managing volunteer event recruitment and coordination from campaign operations agents
Retrieving fundraising contribution data from campaign finance agents
not_for: Conservative/Republican campaigns (VAN is Democratic-aligned; Republicans use i360 or GOP Data Center)
Non-political CRM without voter file and campaign finance integration
General nonprofit without political organizing workflows
best_when: A Democratic political campaign, progressive advocacy organization, or labor union using NGP VAN wants AI agents to automate voter outreach, volunteer coordination, event management, and fundraising tracking.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Voter personal data and political activity records are highly sensitive. Voter file data use is regulated by state laws. Automated voter contact must comply with FEC regulations and TCPA for phone contact.

auth.notes: NGP VAN uses API key authentication with scope-based access control. Application-level API keys with configurable permissions. Different API modes for MyVoters (voter file), MyCampaign (field organizing), and NGP (fundraising). Keys must be requested through VAN partner process.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — political technology enterprise licensing
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual licensing based on committee or organization type; API access included
pricing.notes: Washington DC company. Democratic-aligned political technology. Used by Democratic Party, campaigns, unions, and progressive organizations. Dominant voter file and campaign management platform for left-leaning organizations. Merger with Every Action in 2021 under Bonterra.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; higher limits available for data providers

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Voter personal data and political activity is highly sensitive — subject to state voter file regulations
No public MCP server — REST API with API key partner program
Democratic-aligned platform only — Republican campaigns use different systems
Voter file data use regulated by state laws — verify compliance per state
Automated voter contact must comply with TCPA (phone/text) and FEC regulations
No webhooks — requires polling for contact and survey updates
agent_readiness.security_notes: Voter personal data and political activity records. SOC2. API key with scope-based access. US data residency. Voter file use regulated by state laws. TCPA and FEC compliance required.

security_score_components.security_notes: Voter personal and political activity data. SOC2. API key with scope permissions. US data residency. Voter file state regulations apply.
